name: Banana-brownies, Lo Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Coat a 9-inch square baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, milk powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Puree banana, sugar, egg whites, buttermilk, and vanilla extract in a food processor until smooth.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the puree and pulse just until blended.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Cut into 2-inch squares.
